summary.zh-CN: 本版本优化聊天运行信息、移动端输入区和定时任务模板布局。
summary.en-US: This release refines chat runtime details, the mobile composer, and scheduled task templates.

body.zh-CN: 没有 token 用量时不再显示不可用占位，完整运行信息仍可查看，弹窗打开和关闭时也不会跳位。
body.en-US: Missing token usage no longer creates an unavailable placeholder, full runtime details remain accessible, and the dialog no longer shifts while opening or closing.

title.zh-CN: 移动端输入工具栏更紧凑

body.zh-CN: 空间足够时，聊天输入面板会让工具栏控件保持单行排列，减少不必要的高度。
body.en-US: When space allows, the chat composer keeps toolbar controls on one row and avoids unnecessary height.

title.zh-CN: 定时任务模板适配窄窗口
title.en-US: Scheduled task templates adapt to narrow windows

body.zh-CN: 模板会根据可用内容宽度调整列数，在窄窗口和移动端保持完整可读。
body.en-US: Templates adjust their column count to the available width and remain readable in narrow windows and on mobile devices.

body.zh-CN: 现有 NPM 安装可以直接通过 stable 通道升级；会话、定时任务和模型设置保持不变。
body.en-US: Existing npm installations can update through the stable channel without changing conversations, scheduled tasks, or model settings.

body.zh-CN: 本次 patch 面向 NPM stable 更新链路，不包含新的桌面安装包。
body.en-US: This patch targets the npm stable update path and does not include a new desktop installer.
